bupt.ta.llm

类 DeepSeekClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.llm.DeepSeekClient

  • public final class DeepSeekClient
extends java.lang.Object
    DeepSeek Chat API (OpenAI-compatible: POST /v1/chat/completions).

    Configuration resolution (highest priority first):

    1. Admin-managed JSON (data/ai-api-settings.json) when enabled and a key is set.
    2. Environment variables / JVM properties (TA_AI_*, DEEPSEEK_*) via fromRuntimeSettings(AiApiSettings) — used when admin settings are empty so local ai.env + run-with-ai.ps1 work without re-entering the key in Admin UI.
    3. No-arg DeepSeekClient() for tests and CLI (env only).
    Never commit API keys; use env vars, CI secrets, or the admin settings file.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static java.lang.String DEFAULT_BASE_URL 
      static java.lang.String DEFAULT_MODEL 

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      DeepSeekClient()
      Environment-driven construction.
      DeepSeekClient(boolean enabled, java.lang.String apiKey, java.lang.String baseUrl, java.lang.String model)
      Full constructor allowing an explicit enabled flag, used by fromAdminSettings(AiApiSettings) so the admin toggle bypasses env-var checks.
      DeepSeekClient(java.lang.String apiKey, java.lang.String baseUrl, java.lang.String model)
      Explicit configuration; the client is treated as enabled regardless of environment.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.lang.String chat(java.lang.String systemPrompt, java.lang.String userMessage)
      Single user message with optional system prompt.
      java.lang.String chatCompletions(com.google.gson.JsonArray messages)
      Sends a chat completion request with full control over the messages array.
      java.lang.String chatStream(java.lang.String systemPrompt, java.lang.String userMessage, java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> onChunk)
      Streaming counterpart of chat(String, String).
      static DeepSeekClient fromAdminSettings(AiApiSettings settings)
      Build a client from admin JSON only (no env fallback).
      static DeepSeekClient fromRuntimeSettings(AiApiSettings stored)
      Resolve admin settings, falling back to TA_AI_* / DEEPSEEK_* environment variables when admin has no API key.
      boolean isConfigured() 
      static boolean isRuntimeConfigured(AiApiSettings stored)

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • DEFAULT_BASE_URL

        public static final java.lang.String DEFAULT_BASE_URL
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

      • DEFAULT_MODEL

        public static final java.lang.String DEFAULT_MODEL
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

    • 构造器详细资料

      • DeepSeekClient

        public DeepSeekClient()
        Environment-driven construction. Reads TA_AI_* / DEEPSEEK_* env vars and JVM system properties. Used by integration tests and stand-alone CLIs.

      • DeepSeekClient

        public DeepSeekClient(java.lang.String apiKey,
                      java.lang.String baseUrl,
                      java.lang.String model)
        Explicit configuration; the client is treated as enabled regardless of environment.

      • DeepSeekClient

        public DeepSeekClient(boolean enabled,
                      java.lang.String apiKey,
                      java.lang.String baseUrl,
                      java.lang.String model)
        Full constructor allowing an explicit enabled flag, used by fromAdminSettings(AiApiSettings) so the admin toggle bypasses env-var checks.

    • 方法详细资料

      • fromAdminSettings

        public static DeepSeekClient fromAdminSettings(AiApiSettings settings)
        Build a client from admin JSON only (no env fallback). Used by the admin settings form when displaying what is stored on disk.

      • fromRuntimeSettings

        public static DeepSeekClient fromRuntimeSettings(AiApiSettings stored)
        Resolve admin settings, falling back to TA_AI_* / DEEPSEEK_* environment variables when admin has no API key. This is the entry point for all servlet LLM calls.

      • isRuntimeConfigured

        public static boolean isRuntimeConfigured(AiApiSettings stored)
        返回:
        true when fromRuntimeSettings(AiApiSettings) would be able to call the API

      • isConfigured

        public boolean isConfigured()
        返回:
        true when enabled and a non-blank API key is configured

      • chat

        public java.lang.String chat(java.lang.String systemPrompt,
                             java.lang.String userMessage)
                      throws java.io.IOException
        Single user message with optional system prompt.
        参数:
        systemPrompt - optional system role content (may be null)
        userMessage - required user message
        返回:
        assistant reply text
        抛出:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if not configured
        java.io.IOException - on HTTP or API errors

      • chatCompletions

        public java.lang.String chatCompletions(com.google.gson.JsonArray messages)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Sends a chat completion request with full control over the messages array.
        参数:
        messages - OpenAI-format message array (roles and content)
        返回:
        assistant reply text from the first choice
        抛出:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if not configured
        java.io.IOException - on HTTP or API errors

      • chatStream

        public java.lang.String chatStream(java.lang.String systemPrompt,
                                   java.lang.String userMessage,
                                   java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> onChunk)
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Streaming counterpart of chat(String, String). Pushes each non-empty content delta from the OpenAI-compatible SSE response to onChunk. Returns the concatenation of all delivered chunks so callers can also persist or log the full text. The consumer is not called for the final [DONE] sentinel.
        抛出:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if not configured
        java.io.IOException - HTTP, parsing, or upstream API errors
